message:
refactor: remove tombstone/soft-delete system (Phase 4)

Remove the tombstone soft-delete mechanism across the codebase. Dolt handles
delete propagation natively, making tombstones obsolete.

Key changes:
- Remove StatusTombstone constant and all status checks
- Remove DeletedAt/DeletedBy/DeleteReason/OriginalType fields from Issue struct
- Remove resurrection mechanism (JSONL parent recovery), replace with existence checks
- Simplify schema CHECK constraint (2 clauses instead of 3)
- Remove compact_tombstone.go, resurrection.go, migrate_tombstones.go
- Remove tombstone-specific tests (resurrection, expired tombstones, migration)
- Update doctor/fix validation to skip tombstone-specific checks
- Preserve migration files for backward compatibility with existing databases
- 104 files changed, 6117 deletions, 422 insertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
